zh.lifeSummary: William Bereford是Walter De Bereford的兒子，於1272年出生在英國瓦維其可爾維曉。他於1288年與Margery du Plessis在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維曉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年在英國瓦維其可爾維曉享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bereford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in the parish of Alstonfield, Staffordshire named Beresford, from Old English beofor ‘beaver’ (or possibly from a byname from this word) + Old English ford ‘ford’. This name also became established in Ireland.

History: The first recorded bearer of the surname is John de Beveresford, who held the manor of Beresford, Staffordshire, from c. 1220 to 1241. All present-day Beresfords are apparently descended from Thomas Beresford, who fought at Agincourt in 1415 and who fathered sixteen sons and five daughters. The Irish branch of the family includes the Marquesses of Waterford.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: William Bereford was born in 1272, in Wishaw, Warwickshire, England as the son of Walter De Bereford. He married Margery du Plessis in 1288, in Wishaw, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1326, in Wishaw, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.Burton on the Wolds, Leicestershire, Eng: Burton on the Wolds, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: William Bereford est né en 1272, à Wishaw, Warwickshire, Angleterre, fils de Walter De Bereford. Il a épousé Margery du Plessis en 1288, à Wishaw, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1326, à Wishaw, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Berefordは1272年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィショーでWalter De Berefordの息子として生まれた。1288年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィショーでMargery du Plessisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィショーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bereford(은)는 1272년 영국 워윅실르 와이쇼에서 Walter De Bereford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 와이쇼에서 Margery du Plessis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 영국 워윅실르 와이쇼에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Burton on the Wolds, Leicestershire, Eng: буртон он т волдс, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: William Bereford родился в 1272 г. в местности вишав, варвиккшир, Англия. Его отца звали Walter De Bereford. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery du Plessis в 1288 г. в местности вишав, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности вишав, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.
